comments: Approved after direct verification against tasks/v0.8-cli-architecture-refactor-review.json, tasks/v0.8-cli-architecture-refactor-contract.json, tasks/v0.8-cli-architecture-refactor-result.json, and GIT_MASTER=1 git show --stat --name-status a622ea7. The commit matches the result artifact exactly: README.md, README_zh-CN.md, bin/team-agents-cowork.js, documentation/EN/getting-started/installation.md, documentation/EN/guides/team-collaboration.md, documentation/ZH/getting-started/installation.md, documentation/ZH/guides/team-collaboration.md, package.json, tasks/v0.8-cli-architecture-refactor-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-cli-architecture-refactor-review.json. bin/team-agents-cowork.js was created as a unified command router for init/review/mcp, delegating to the existing init and review scripts plus the built MCP server entrypoint. package.json now exposes team-agents-cowork plus raw fallback scripts agent-protocol-init and agent-protocol-review, and removes the disjointed alias entries team-agents-cowork-init and agent-protocol-mcp from the bin map. Documentation and READMEs were updated to use npx team-agents-cowork init, team-agents-cowork mcp, and team-agents-cowork review. No runtime DAG execution engine implementation occurred, and no workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantic changes were introduced in commit a622ea7.
